surface: M4 authenticated local operator usage API foundation

checks.browser: skip: authenticated local operator usage API only; no dashboard UI in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because the slice exposes a token-gated local operator usage snapshot over already-sanitized local JSONL usage events. It uses a mock upstream, loopback-only smokes, no real IOTA network, no Docker, no production DB, no dashboard UI, and no real sponsor/app/operator credentials.
knownFailures: Initial server tests failed with 404 for /operator/usage before the route was implemented; expected TDD red state.
Initial config tests failed because env wiring for GASKIT_USAGE_EVENT_STORE_PATH and GASKIT_OPERATOR_USAGE_TOKEN did not exist; expected TDD red state.
notes: Adds opt-in GET /operator/usage behind a separate bearer token, with no-store responses, safe bounded errors, default absence unless configured, env wiring through GASKIT_USAGE_EVENT_STORE_PATH plus GASKIT_OPERATOR_USAGE_TOKEN, serialized single-process local JSONL appends, and smoke/doc proof. It remains a local foundation, not production access control, dashboard UI, retention, CSV export, or a production database.
